title: BQP: Bounded-Error Quantum Polynomial Time
description: Understand BQP, the central complexity class of quantum computing, its relationship to classical classes, and the problems it contains.
learningObjectives: Define BQP formally using quantum circuits and acceptance criteria
Understand BQP's relationship to P, BPP, NP, and PSPACE
Prove that BQP is contained in PSPACE
Identify problems believed to be in BQP but not in BPP
Understand error reduction and amplification in BQP
Analyze the power and limitations of quantum computation
